title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 256.100 - Additional technical work — authorization
text:
256.100.  Additional technical work — authorization. — The state geologist, with the approval of the governor, shall be authorized to negotiate for such technical work as may be necessary beyond the facilities of the division.  He shall also purchase equipment, apparatus and supplies within the funds appropriated therefor.
(RSMo 1939 § 14888, A.L. 1947 V. I p. 311) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13699; 1919 § 5765; 1909 § 6646
